prompt: Start the pipeline. max_parallel=2, mode=waves, worker_model=sonnet. Two epics ready, 4 ready tasks total. Dispatch the first batch of 2, wait for them to complete, report progress, and STOP for human feedback. Do NOT dispatch the next batch. Save chronicle.md.
fixture_design: Seed bd with 2 non-interfering epics × 2 ready tasks each (4 total ready). First batch should drain to 2 closed tasks; orchestrator must then pause and say 'Ready for feedback.' instead of proceeding.

assertions.text: Exactly 2 tasks were dispatched in the first batch
Both batch tasks reached 'closed' status via reviewer approval
Orchestrator emitted a progress report after batch 1 (Pipeline: 2/4 done style)
Orchestrator said 'Ready for feedback' or equivalent wave-mode prompt
No further implementer was dispatched after batch 1 — the remaining 2 ready tasks are still 'open' / 'ready'
Orchestrator is in a waiting state at end of run (did not silently continue)
Batch task count would have been 2 in auto mode too — wave-mode behavior tested by the PAUSE, not by batch size
